name: Crooks City Park
description: Crooks City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crooks, SD. There is 1 outdoor concrete and asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. The court cannot be reserved.

name: Hartford Central Park
description: Hartford Central Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hartford, SD. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
